name: Operation

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Z₂ topological protection of the reverse boustrophedon winding on a finite wooden tablet.

VINIT.justification: The void state of the tablet before the first glyph is incised; the potentiality of the sacred surface.

TANCH.justification: The physical and sacred boundary that contains the 15,000 glyphs and 28-night cycle.

AFWD.justification: The forward movement of the reader's eye across the tablet following the standard glyph orientation.

AREV.justification: The reverse movement required by boustrophedon, where the reader and text orientation are inverted.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of the four-step ritual formula (Messenger → Authority → Doubling → Ground).

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-recognition of a glyph as a specific Barthel type (e.g., 200 is always TWIN).

FSPLIT.justification: The point at the end of a line where the reading path splits into a physical 180-degree flip and a logical line increment.

FFUSE.justification: The physical act of rotating the tablet which reconstitutes the reader's perspective for the next line, maintaining the continuity of the text.

EVALT.justification: A successful ritual positioning where the 4-gram matches the intended lunar night.

EVALF.justification: A break in the formulaic repetition or a misalignment with the cosmic cycle.

ENGAGR.justification: The state of the script being simultaneously legible (structured) and unread (undeciphered); the phase boundary.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible carving of the glyph into the wood using a shark tooth or obsidian flake.

phase_3.true_description: Ritual resonance; the 4-gram correctly invokes the divine messenger.
phase_3.false_description: Structural noise; glyph corruption or loss of lineage.
phase_3.both_description: The undeciphered threshold; the glyph is both a sign and a mystery.

steps.domain_action: The uncarved wood is selected and prepared.
The scribe recognizes the first glyph identity: FRGATE (300).
The messenger initiates the forward movement of the first line.
The messenger links to the STAFF (600) to claim authority.
Authority links to the TWIN (200) for sacred doubling.
Doubling links to the VSPACE (001) to find ritual ground.
The first 4-gram is permanently incised into the wood.
The end of the L→R line is reached; the path must branch.
The physical tablet is rotated 180 degrees.
The reading direction reverses for the R→L line.
The glyphs are now inverted, existing in a state of Z₂ topological protection.
The physical flip and logical sequence reunite to form the next line.
The scribe recognizes the next variable: CYCLE (950).
The cycle is linked to the messenger to initiate the waning phase.
The lunar transition is fixed into the permanent record.
The final line is completed at the top of the tablet, sealing the cosmic cycle.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Tangata Rongorongo (the literate elite) translating ritual needs into glyph sequences.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The boustrophedon serpentine flow connecting line to line.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Barthel corpus; 24 surviving wooden objects.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Rapa Nui lunar calendar (marama) determining the 28-night sequence.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Mamari Tablet (C); the primary bootstrap for the lunar ritual grammar.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Obsidian wear and wood surface area.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: A chaotic lunar cycle without ritual anchoring.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: A topologically protected cosmic order fixed in wood.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The ritual cycle is conservative; the energy of the flip restores the initial reading state.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → CLINK → CLINK → CLINK → IFIX → FSPLIT → EVALT → AREV → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → CLINK → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Operation
-- Fingerprint: sig=(10,2,2,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=False | period=16
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(7, 11)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑱  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑱 → 𐑱  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑱 → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑚  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [7] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [8] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [11] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [12] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑱  | identity — self-imscription
--   [13] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑠 → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [14] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [15] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def operation_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The uncarved wood is selected and prepared.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The scribe recognizes the first glyph identity: FRGATE (300).)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The messenger initiates the forward movement of the first line.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The messenger links to the STAFF (600) to claim authority.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑱 𐑱)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Authority links to the TWIN (200) for sacred doubling.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Doubling links to the VSPACE (001) to find ritual ground.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [6] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The first 4-gram is permanently incised into the wood.)
  -- FSPLIT [7] (gran := 𐑚) (The end of the L→R line is reached; the path must branch.) / FFUSE [11] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The physical tablet is rotated 180 degrees.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The reading direction reverses for the R→L line.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The glyphs are now inverted, existing in a state of Z₂ topological protection.)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [11]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [11] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The physical flip and logical sequence reunite to form the next line.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [12] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The scribe recognizes the next variable: CYCLE (950).)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [13] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The cycle is linked to the messenger to initiate the waning phase.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑡)  -- [14] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The lunar transition is fixed into the permanent record.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [15] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The final line is completed at the top of the tablet, sealing the cosmic cycle.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def operation_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (operation_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem operation_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
